query: SELECT sb.customerExternalId, sb.externalId AS sasboss_id, real.externalId AS real_id, real.supplierName AS real_supplier, real.monthlyCost AS real_cost FROM services sb JOIN services real ON real.customerExternalId = sb.customerExternalId AND real.supplierName != 'SasBoss' AND real.serviceType = 'Internet' WHERE sb.supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND sb.serviceType = 'Internet' LIMIT 10;
